jsonLd.title: EaseMyTrip is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a E-commerce Executive in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
